title: Fidelity
description:
Previously "Ikelene's Vanilla Improvements"

A bunch of mods to make vanilla Minecraft so much more visually appealing!
body:
# 🌌 Fidelity

**See and hear Minecraft the way it was meant to be.** **Fidelity** is a complete overhaul of the game's graphics that pushes the limits of how Minecraft looks without losing its essence. This pack changes the familiar blocky world into a stunning, living environment by adding over 100 carefully chosen mods. The core gameplay stays the same, though. ## ✨ Great Visuals **Next-Gen Rendering:** Uses **Iris Shaders**, **Sodium**, and **Distant Horizons** to create cinematic lighting and draw distances that go on forever. * **Living World:** With **Fresh Animations**, **Not Enough Animations**, and **Wavey Capes**, you can move around easily. With "Windy," "Wakes," and "Particle Rain," the environment even feels alive.* The 3D Overhaul: The world gets more depth and texture that you can almost feel with things like "Actually 3D Stuff," "3D Skin Layers," and "Baha's 3D Beds." * **Clean UI:** A simple experience with **Smooth GUI**, **Blur+**, **Immersive Hotbar**, and great fonts. ## 🎧 Immersive Audio * **Soundscapes:** Deepen your immersion with **AmbientSounds**, **Presence Footsteps**, and **Sound Physics Remastered** for realistic echoes and environmental depth. * **Curated Music:** Enjoy a richer soundtrack with the **Stellarity Music Addon**, **Celeste Music Cassettes**, and the **True Ending** Ender Dragon themes. ## 🛠️ Modern Utilities * **Seamless Navigation:** Stay oriented with **Xaero’s World Map** and **Minimap**. * **Social & Connectivity:** Built-in **Essential** support for easy friend invites, **Simple Voice Chat** for proximity audio, and **Chat Heads** for a better social feel. * **Technical Polish:** Optimized with **Lithium**, **FerriteCore**, and **ImmediatelyFast** to ensure the smoothest frame rates possible. ## ⚙️ Performance & Flexibility Fidelity is built to be inclusive. Every high-fidelity feature is modular and fully configurable. * **High-End Ready:** Max out your settings for a true "Next-Gen" masterpiece. * **Optimized for All:** Using a laptop or an older rig? Simply toggle off the heavy shaders or LOD settings via the in-game menus. The pack remains beautiful and functional even on modest setups. --- > **Pure Atmosphere. Zero Gameplay Changes. Simply Minecraft.**
Full Content List ## Mods for Version 5.1 - [2D Projectiles ➵](https://modrinth.com/mod/twod_projectiles) - [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) - [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) -
